ab: hani i luma’ ci Puhay haw?
en: A: Is Puhay at home?

ab: i luma’ tu ciniza, na cumuda.
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: hani i luma’ ci Tipus haw?
en: A: Is Tipus home?

ab: nayay ciniza, hani u canan ku kawaw isu saw?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事？
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?

ab: cima saw?
en: A: Who is it?

ab: baki, ci Tipus kaku, wawahen ku panan.
en: B: Grandfather, I am Tipus, please open the door.

ab: hani cima saw?
en: A: Who is it?

ab: Buting, ci Kanasaw kaku, tayni miidang i tisuwan.
en: B:Buting, I’m Kanasaw, I’ve come to play with you.

ab: matenes tu caay kasasuazih.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: hang! mabulah tu kaku tisuwan, awza malpadang i!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你，快來聊天吧。
en: B: Yeah! I’ve missed you, come and chat.

ab: na enenga, na pinanum i tu uciya.
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea.

ab: kukay.
en: A: Thank you.

ab: na pinanum i tu uciya.
en: B: Please have some tea.

ab: hubaw! asu’ nanumen ku uciya namu.
en: A:Your tea is delicious.

ab: awza mukan tu heci kita i!
en: B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: hang! uyni a heci asu’ sa azihen.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: asu’ haw kanen ku heci?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: hang, tatenga’ asu’ kanen.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: mamin tu ci ina misakalabi, awza mukan!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: hang, mibanaw tu lima kaku.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: bilil han mukan, caay kau tau kisu.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: yadah ku nikanan aku, mabecul tu.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: sayadahen ku nikan, amana kasikaz.
en: B: Eat more, don’t be polite.

ab: hang, tatenga’ asu’.
en: A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: a miliyas tu kaku, zuma/duma hawtu tayni miazih tisuwan.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: hang i, haymaw han tu.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: duutan tu, a talumu’ tu kaku.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.

ab: tayni han tu anu ayaw midang i!
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: pihaymaw i ku culil.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: hang i, silawad tayni han tu i luma’ aku midang.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
